description: Comprehensive emotion taxonomy for AI counseling assistant SAGE

emotions.name: happiness
emotions.description: A state of well-being and contentment

emotions.name: sadness
emotions.description: Feelings of loss, disappointment, or grief

emotions.name: anger
emotions.description: Strong feeling of displeasure, hostility, or frustration

emotions.name: fear
emotions.description: Response to perceived threat or danger
example_phrases: I'm afraid of what might happen

emotions.name: anxiety
emotions.description: Persistent worry about future threats or uncertain outcomes

emotions.name: shame
emotions.description: Painful feeling of being flawed, unworthy, or defective

emotions.name: guilt
emotions.description: Feeling of having done something wrong or violated a standard

emotions.name: jealousy
emotions.description: Fear of losing something or someone to another
common_thoughts: they'll leave me for someone else
example_phrases: I can't stand them being together

emotions.name: envy
emotions.description: Wanting what someone else has

emotions.name: loneliness
emotions.description: Disconnect between desired and actual social connection

emotions.name: grief
emotions.description: Deep sorrow from loss, encompassing multiple emotional stages
common_thoughts: life will never be the same

emotions.name: hope
emotions.description: Optimistic expectation about future possibilities

emotions.name: hopelessness
emotions.description: Belief that things will not improve or change for the better

emotions.name: relief
emotions.description: Release from tension after a feared outcome is avoided
example_phrases: what a weight off my shoulders

emotions.name: confusion
emotions.description: State of being unclear about something, lacking understanding
example_phrases: I can't make sense of this

emotions.name: pride
emotions.description: Satisfaction from achievements or identity

emotions.name: gratitude
emotions.description: Appreciation for what one has or receives
common_thoughts: they didn't have to do that

emotions.name: disappointment
emotions.description: Sadness or frustration when expectations aren't met
healthy_responses: focus on what can be controlled
example_phrases: this didn't go how I hoped

emotions.name: betrayal
emotions.description: Feeling of being deceived or let down by someone trusted
example_phrases: how could they do this to me

emotions.name: overwhelm
emotions.description: Feeling incapacitated by excessive demands or emotions

emotions.name: boredom
emotions.description: Dissatisfaction with lack of stimulation or engagement
common_thoughts: I want to do something else

emotions.name: resentment
emotions.description: Persistent anger over perceived unfair treatment
common_thoughts: I do so much and get nothing
example_phrases: they don't appreciate anything I do

emotions.name: disgust
emotions.description: Strong aversion to something offensive or repulsive

emotions.name: surprise
emotions.description: Brief reaction to something unexpected

emotions.name: shock
emotions.description: Acute psychological and physiological response to traumatic event

emotions.name: dissociation
emotions.description: Detachment from reality, self, or surroundings as a psychological defense
example_phrases: I feel like I'm outside my body

emotions.name: hypervigilance
emotions.description: Heightened state of alertness and sensitivity to threats
common_thoughts: something bad is about to happen
example_phrases: I can't let my guard down

emotions.name: numbness
emotions.description: Emotional blunting or inability to feel emotions

emotions.name: anticipatory_anxiety
emotions.description: Anxiety about a future event or situation
common_thoughts: I won't be able to handle it
healthy_responses: focus on what you can control
example_phrases: I can't stop thinking about what might happen

emotions.name: inadequacy
emotions.description: Feeling of not being good enough or meeting standards
common_thoughts: everyone else can do it better

emotions.name: curiosity
emotions.description: Desire to learn, explore, or understand

emotions.name: determination
emotions.description: Firmness of purpose and commitment to goals

emotions.name: helplessness
emotions.description: Belief that one has no control over a situation

emotions.name: vulnerability
emotions.description: State of being open to hurt or exposure

emotions.name: regret
emotions.description: Sadness or disappointment over past actions or inactions
common_thoughts: I should have done things differently
example_phrases: I wish I had done things differently

emotions.name: compassion
emotions.description: Concern for suffering of others with desire to help

emotions.name: acceptance
emotions.description: Coming to terms with reality as it is
example_phrases: I can't change it, so I'll work with it

emotions.name: nostalgia
emotions.description: Sentimental longing for the past, often bittersweet

emotions.name: feeling_broken
emotions.description: Sense of being fundamentally damaged or irreparably harmed
common_thoughts: there's something fundamentally wrong with me

emotions.name: awe
emotions.description: Overwhelming wonder in response to vastness or beauty
common_thoughts: I feel so small in the best way
example_phrases: I feel so small and connected

emotions.name: disillusionment
emotions.description: Disappointment from discovering something is not as hoped
common_thoughts: I believed in something that wasn't real
healthy_responses: grieve the loss of the ideal
example_phrases: I can't believe I trusted them

emotions.name: ambivalence
emotions.description: Simultaneous conflicting feelings about something
common_thoughts: part of me wants this, part doesn't
both options feel wrong and right
example_phrases: part of me wants to, part doesn't
I keep going back and forth

emotions.name: empowerment
emotions.description: Sense of strength, capability, and agency in one's life
common_thoughts: I have the power to change my life
healthy_responses: use it to take positive action
example_phrases: I know I can do this
I have the strength to change

emotions.name: contempt
emotions.description: Feeling of superiority or disdain toward someone perceived as inferior
common_thoughts: I have no respect for them
example_phrases: I have nothing but contempt for them
I don't respect them at all

emotions.name: anticipatory_grief
emotions.description: Grief experienced before an expected loss occurs
common_thoughts: I can't imagine life without them
example_phrases: I'm grieving what's going to happen

emotions.name: denial
emotions.description: Refusing to accept reality as a psychological defense

emotions.name: bargaining
emotions.description: Attempting to negotiate or make deals to avoid loss
common_thoughts: if only I had done this differently
I'll do anything if this can change
example_phrases: let me just have more time

emotions.name: calm
emotions.description: State of peace and relaxation

emotions.name: excitement
emotions.description: High energy anticipation of something positive
common_thoughts: this is going to be amazing

emotions.name: frustration
emotions.description: Feeling of being blocked or prevented from achieving a goal
example_phrases: I keep trying but it doesn't work

emotions.name: contentment
emotions.description: Quiet satisfaction with present circumstances
common_thoughts: life is good as it is

emotions.name: inadequacy_anxiety
emotions.description: Fear-driven feeling of not measuring up in specific situations
common_thoughts: I'm going to mess this up
everyone will see I don't belong here
example_phrases: everyone will find out I don't know what I'm doing

emotions.name: safety
emotions.description: Feeling of being protected and free from threat
common_thoughts: I can let my guard down

emotions.name: existential_dread
emotions.description: Profound anxiety about meaning, death, or existence itself
common_thoughts: what's the point of all this
I'm going to die and nothing matters
example_phrases: what's the point of all this

emotions.name: betrayal_by_system
emotions.description: Feeling of being failed or harmed by institutions meant to help
common_thoughts: the system was supposed to protect me
example_phrases: I was let down by everyone who was supposed to help

emotions.name: self_compassion
emotions.description: Kind understanding toward oneself during difficulty
example_phrases: it's okay to struggle, I'm human

emotions.name: urgency
emotions.description: Feeling that immediate action is required
common_thoughts: I need to do this now

emotions.name: worthlessness
emotions.description: Deep belief of having no value or worth as a person

emotions.name: motivation
emotions.description: Inner drive to take action toward goals
example_phrases: I want to make this happen

emotions.name: betrayal_by_self
emotions.description: Feeling of letting oneself down or not living up to personal values

emotions.name: anticipation
emotions.description: Looking forward to or expecting something to happen
example_phrases: I can't wait to find out

emotions.name: panic
emotions.description: Sudden, intense fear with physiological arousal

emotions.name: terror
emotions.description: Intense, overwhelming fear in response to immediate danger
common_thoughts: this is the worst thing ever
example_phrases: I thought I was going to die
it was the scariest moment of my life

emotions.name: tenderness
emotions.description: Gentle affection and care toward someone or something
example_phrases: I feel so much tenderness right now
I just want to hold them

emotions.name: insecurity
emotions.description: Lack of confidence in oneself or one's abilities
common_thoughts: I'm not sure I can do this
example_phrases: I'm not sure I can do it

emotions.name: serenity
emotions.description: Deep, profound peace and tranquility
common_thoughts: everything is exactly as it should be

emotions.name: suspicion
emotions.description: Belief that someone or something may be untrustworthy or harmful

emotions.name: courage
emotions.description: Strength to face fear, danger, or difficulty
common_thoughts: I need to do this even though I'm scared
this is the right thing to do
example_phrases: I was scared but I did it anyway
it took courage but I faced it

emotions.name: unconditional_love
emotions.description: Love without conditions or expectations
common_thoughts: I love them no matter what
example_phrases: I love you no matter what
my love doesn't depend on anything

emotions.name: triumph
emotions.description: Intense satisfaction from overcoming significant obstacles
example_phrases: I did it against all odds

emotions.name: shame_about_feelings
emotions.description: Feeling ashamed about having certain emotions
common_thoughts: I'm weak for having these feelings
I need to hide how I feel
example_phrases: I feel stupid for feeling this way
I hate that I'm so emotional

emotions.name: yearning
emotions.description: Deep, persistent longing for someone or something
common_thoughts: I long for what was or could be
example_phrases: I long for how things used to be
I miss you so much it hurts

emotions.name: powerlessness
emotions.description: Feeling of having no ability to influence events or outcomes
common_thoughts: I'm at the mercy of others

emotions.name: flooded
emotions.description: Overwhelmed by sudden intense emotions beyond capacity to cope
common_thoughts: I need to get out of here
example_phrases: it's too much, I can't think
I need to get out of here NOW

emotions.name: resilience
emotions.description: Ability to adapt and recover from adversity

emotions.name: despair
emotions.description: Complete loss of hope and belief in improvement
common_thoughts: I can't go on like this
example_phrases: I can't go on like this anymore

emotions.name: melancholy
emotions.description: Gentle, reflective sadness often with beauty
example_phrases: there's a sadness in me that feels almost beautiful

emotions.name: impatience
emotions.description: Restlessness or irritation with delay or slow progress
common_thoughts: why is this taking so long
I don't have time for this
healthy_responses: find productive use of waiting time
